name: Orange Oriental Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Turkey Breast, cut into 1-inch Pieces
2 teaspoons Fresh Gingerroot, peeled and minced
1 cup Red Bell Peppers, cut into wide strips
1 cup Snow Peas, trimmed and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the cornstarch, soy sauce, orange juice, orange peel, salt, sugar, and pepper.
2. Cook the turkey medallions in a large nonstick skillet until no longer pink. Remove from the skillet.
3. Reheat the skillet until hot, then add the oil.
4. Add the garlic, gingerroot, and onions; stir-fry for about 1 minute.
5. Pour in the cornstarch mixture and stir constantly until thickened.
6. Add the peppers, snow peas, crushed red pepper, and turkey; simmer for 2 minutes.
7. Serve over hot rice, white or brown.
